# Robert Francis Skitch

From a boyhood in the Collie coalfields to Lieutenant Colonel commanding the Army Survey Regiment — eleven memoirs spanning eight decades of Australian life.

## Documents

- [Junior](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1934-1945_junior.html) — 1934–1945
- [The Years Between](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1945-1955_the-years-between.html) — 1945–1955
- [In The Navy](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1953-1954_in-the-navy.html) — 1953–1954
- [The Army Years - Part 1 - The Young Soldier Surveyor](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1955-1962_the-army-years-part-1-the-young-soldier-surveyor.html) — 1955–1962
- [The Army Years - Part 2 - Being an Officer](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1961-1969_the-army-years-part-2-being-an-officer.html) — 1961–1969
- [War In Vietnam – A Surveyor’s Story - Part 1 - The Genesis](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1965-1966_war-in-vietnam-a-surveyors-story-part-1-the-genesis.html) — 1965–1966
- [The Army Years - Part 3 - Singapore](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1969-1972_the-army-year-part-3-singapore.html) — 1969–1972
- [The Army Years – Part 4 - Now a Major](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1971-1975_the-army-years-part-4-now-a-major.html) — 1971–1975
- [The Army Years - Part 5 - In Command](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1975-1981_the-army-years-part-5-in-command.html) — 1975–1981
- [The Public Servant](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1981-1990_the-public-servant.html) — 1981-1990
- [War In Vietnam – A Surveyor’s Story - Part 2 - A Developing Role](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1966_war-in-vietnam-a-surveyors-story-part-2-a-developing-role.html) — 1966
- [War In Vietnam – A Surveyor’s Story - Part 3 - Established](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1967_war-in-vietnam-a-surveyors-story-part-3-established.html) — 1967
- [War In Vietnam – A Surveyor’s Story - Part 4 - Vietnam It Was](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/1967_war-in-vietnam-a-surveyors-story-part-4-vietnam-it-was.html) — 1967
- [Three Days in Berlin](https://history.skitch.me/rfs/2004_three-days-in-berlin.html) — 2004
